---
title: "P00 | Minimal HTML Report"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(rmdreportdeck)

df <- data.frame(group = c("A", "B"), value = c(2, 5))
plot_obj <- ggplot(df, aes(group, value, fill = group)) + geom_col()
bundle <- report_plot_bundle(plot_obj, "plot", data = df)
```

# Goal

This is a minimal example HTML report for `rmdreportdeck`.

## Figure

```{r}
print(report_bundle_asset_bar(
  "Downloads",
  bundle,
  tsv_label = "TSV"
))
print(plot_obj)
```

## Table

```{r}
knitr::kable(df)
```
